case_title: STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER, CHIEF VS. JUSTIN LAU

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER, CHIEF DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT LAU, JUSTIN DBA KUMON JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
